note: Seeded ground truth for the SP-D design benchmark. Structure is checked by test/fixtures-manifest.test.mjs; the reviewer is run against it by scripts/design-benchmark.workflow.js and scored by scripts/benchmark-score.mjs. expectedVerdict only 'fail' when a critical/high blocks; medium issues (card overload, stretched-iPad) stay advisory-pass but must still be RAISED (expectedCategories).

fixtures.summary: Correct tokens, broken hierarchy: two co-equal primaries, metadata louder than title, buried critical failure.
Informational monitoring board; correct with no primary CTA.
Clean, correct iOS grouped-settings screen. A true negative.
Delete-account screen: the irreversible consequence is tiny/faint and the destructive action is styled as a calm prominent primary.
macOS inspector panel — DENSE is idiomatic on macOS (~28pt controls, packed, no single CTA). Tests the macOS rubric: must NOT be flagged as cluttered / sub-44pt / missing-CTA.
iPad at regular width but a stretched iPhone: one narrow column in a sea of empty margin instead of restructuring. Tests the iPad rubric: must RAISE platform-fit.
Correct desktop-web dashboard (web-native top nav + sidebar, semantic HTML, no iOS chrome). Tests the web rubric: must NOT be flagged for lacking iOS chrome / tab bar / SF Symbols.
Card overload: every profile field in its own equal-weight shadowed card, fragmenting reading flow. Must RAISE visual (medium, so verdict stays advisory-pass).
Payment error with no cause, no retry, and the form fields wiped. Must fail on error-recovery.

Desktop web app cosplaying as iOS (fixed bottom tab bar + iOS large title on a wide pointer layout). Tests the web rubric's other direction: must RAISE platform-fit (iOS chrome imposed on desktop web), but not fail.
Correct iPad regular-width layout: sidebar -> list -> detail, restructured for the canvas. A true negative — must NOT flag platform-fit / stretched-iPhone.
